name: Dark Fruitcake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Brandy (or apple juice or water)
recipeInstructions:
1. THE DAY BEFORE: Combine all dried fruits, nuts, and zest in a mixing bowl. Add the candied ginger and spices, and toss well to mix. Add molasses and liquids, and mix thoroughly. Cover and let stand overnight at room temperature.
2. PREHEAT OVEN TO 275°F (135°C). Grease four (9-by-5-by-3-inch) loaf pans with butter or cooking spray. Line the bottoms of the pans with waxed paper and grease the paper lightly.
3. COARSELY GRIND 1 cup flour over the fruit mixture, stirring to coat evenly.
4. COMBINE remaining 3 cups flour with baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a bowl; sift together on a sheet of waxed paper.
5. CREAM butter until smooth, then add brown sugar gradually, beating well after each addition. Beat in eggs, two at a time, mixing thoroughly after each egg. Stir in vanilla.
6. ADD DRY INGREDIENTS to the fruit mixture and stir until just combined; batter should be smooth and evenly blended.
7. DIVIDE batter among prepared loaf pans, filling them about halfway (1/2 inch from the top).
8. BAKE for 2 hours, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean and cakes are golden brown on top. Allow to cool in the pans for 10 minutes before turning out onto wire racks to cool completely.
Makes 4 Cakes
